name: codex-themes
description: Desktop theme manager for the OpenAI Codex desktop app (CDP injection, no patching)
author: canghe

scripts.build:web: astro check --root web && astro build --root web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.web.json --noEmit && astro check --root web
scripts.test: esbuild electron/deep-links.test.ts electron/engine/theme.test.ts electron/engine/layout-catalog.test.ts electron/ai/ai.test.ts electron/engine/package-safety.test.ts server/commerce-api/alipay.test.ts server/commerce-api/avatar.test.ts server/commerce-api/theme-package.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:adm-zip --external:alipay-sdk --external:sharp --alias:electron=./electron/test-stubs/electron-stub.ts --outdir=tmp/tests --out-extension:.js=.mjs && node --test "tmp/tests/**/*.test.mjs"
